title: Improper Access Control through Role Inheritance in Splunk AI Toolkit app
description: Improper Access Control through Role Inheritance in Splunk AI Toolkit app
solution:
Upgrade Splunk AI Toolkit to version 5.7.3 or higher.
Product Status
Product
Base Version
Affected Version
Fix Version
Splunk AI Toolkit
5.7
Below 5.7.3
5.7.3
Mitigations and Workarounds
Turn Splunk AI Toolkit 5.7.2 and lower off until a patched version is available. See
Manage app and add-on objects
in the Splunk documentation.
If you must leave the app on, then perform one of the following options and restart the Splunk platform instance:
1. Edit the
$SPLUNK_HOME/etc/aps/Splunk_ML_Toolkit/defa
